title: Add rynzen to bots
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [rynzen](https://rynzen.uk/) to bots
- Generate images in Discord by typing prompts in a specific channel; rynzen uses pollinations ais flux or flux schnell model to produce the images.

Fixes #9137

gist.headline: Rynzen joins the hive
gist.blurb: A new Discord bot called Rynzen just sprouted in the community greenhouse! It lets you generate images directly in your Discord channels using our Flux models.
gist.summary: Added the Rynzen Discord bot to the community showcase, which allows users to generate images in specific channels using Pollinations' Flux and Flux-Schnell models.
gist.impact: Discord communities can now easily integrate Rynzen to bring high-quality AI image generation directly to their servers.
gist.visual_concept: A Discord bot generating images. Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot (representing the bot) hanging out in a cozy digital greenhouse, with the robot displaying a chat bubble and a generated image.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky retro robot with a CRT monitor head sitting together in a digital greenhouse. The robot's screen shows a glowing chat bubble and a freshly generated pixel landscape. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, soft pastel gradients, retro gaming vibes.
